subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath manifested Himself as He wished and willed, and hath proclaimed from the midmost heart of creation that there is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی اظهر نفسه کیف شاء و اراد و نطق فی قطب الابداع انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
